guidance: Teach ONE specific, actionable tactic they can do this week to make more money. Real steps, scripts, or settings — worth paying for.
evidence_note: Tactics must be logically airtight and actually executable as described.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Education / Informative' was the most under-served eligible category (target 20%, recent 16%).
post_rationale: Reels still lead reach for cold audiences, and this fills a genuinely unclaimed channel (Google Business Profile chat) with a documented Google rule and a concrete setting to fix this week.
